description: Composition Blue jeans with heavily washed and distressed look made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, double patch pocket detail on the left hip pocket, comfortable waistband with loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, embedded seal on the front right leg, and metal button and zipper closure on the front Fitting Low rise; Narrow Fit Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with the heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from spykar, while the cotton and spandex fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accomodate your body movements. Team it with t-shirts and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
